headlines.description: Ashley Young netted a free-kick and Craig Dawson twice put the ball into his own net as Everton thumped Wolves 4-0 in the Premier League on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Everton vs Wolves: Young nets free kick in rout

headlines.description: Manchester City's Kevin De Bruyne bagged one goal and set up another in his first start in more than two months as City trounced Nottingham Forest 3-0 on Wednesday to end their four-game losing run in the Premier League.
headlines.shortLinkText: De Bruyne goal, assist helps City end winless run

headlines.description: Premier League leaders Liverpool had their advantage cut to seven points as Fabian Schar's late equaliser earned Newcastle United a thrilling 3-3 draw at St James' Park on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Newcastle peg back Liverpool after Salah brace

headlines.description: Chelsea's impressive 5-1 win at bottom club Southampton closed the gap to leaders Liverpool in the Premier League on Wednesday, with the home side having Jack Stephens sent off before half time for a hair-pull on Marc Cucurella.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sancho, Palmer score as Chelsea ease past Saints

headlines.description: Jurrien Timber and William Saliba scored from corners to give Arsenal a 2-0 victory over Manchester United at the Emirates Stadium on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Arsenal vs. Man Utd: Gunners give Amorim 1st loss

headlines.description: Aston Villa survived a jittery second half to end an eight-match winless streak with a 3-1 home Premier League win over Brentford on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Aston Villa beat Brentford to end winless run
